title: Grilled Tangy Tender Beef Brisket Stir-fry
description: A lazy-sunday comfort food dish featuring tender beef brisket seasoned with tangy spices and grilled to perfection in a Paleo-friendly manner.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Season the beef brisket with salt and a mix of paprika, garlic powder, lemon zest, and a touch of apple cider vinegar. Marinate for at least an hour or up to overnight if desired.
Slice both eggplants lengthwise into rounds. Thinly slice onions and bell peppers.
Place all vegetables on the preheated grill until tender and lightly charred, about 5-7 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and place grilled vegetables onto a serving platter or individual plates.
Slice the beef brisket against the grain into thin slices. Drizzle with melted butter if desired for added richness.
Mix in some fresh herbs like parsley or thyme, depending on your preference, to garnish before serving.
Serve the stir-fried grilled vegetables and sliced brisket together as a Paleo-friendly main dish.
